verdict: The chart has decent rhythmic ideas but is marred by physically impossible three-panel hold-jumps and extremely harsh 16th-note jump transitions.

issues.problem: Physically impossible 3-panel combination: a DR jump is placed while the U hold is active.
Physically impossible 3-panel combination: a UR jump is placed while the D hold is active.
Extremely fast single-foot transition (86ms) from L to D while the other foot is locked holding U.
Jarring 16th-note jump transition (U -> DL -> U at 173 BPM) which is nearly unplayable and disrupts flow.
Repetitive spin pattern (L, U, D, R) looped 6 times sequentially, making the ending stream feel uninspired.
